title: centaurea × szenicensis
intro: Centaurea × szenicensis, also known as Szechuan cornflower, is a hybrid plant species within the Centaurea genus, characterized by its vibrant blue flowers. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, and its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Consuming Centaurea × szenicensis has been associated with various health benefits, including reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and enhanced immune function. Traditional herbal preparations involving this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, particularly those related to the skin and digestive system.
